ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the school */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the school within the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player in the game */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player in the game */,
  "average" REAL /* Average points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_statistics" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* Highest score achieved by the player in the season */,
  "average" REAL /* Average points scored by the player in the season */,
  "rebounds_total" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "assists_total" INTEGER /* Total assists by the player in the season */,
  "steals_total" INTEGER /* Total steals by the player in the season */,
  "blocks_total" INTEGER /* Total blocks by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers_total" INTEGER /* Total turnovers by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated form of the position name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics were accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
